title: High Post-Prandial Blood Glucose ~230 mg/dL (12.8 mmol/L)
description: Blood glucose 230.6 mg/dL (post-prandial) exceeds target of <180 mg/dL. Rising from 182 mg/dL previously.
clinical_context: Patient has T2DM with hyperglycemia, on Metformin 1000mg BID. ADA target fasting glucose is 80-130 mg/dL, post-prandial <180 mg/dL.
